{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}Setup - Collaborative Whiteboard{% endblock %} {% block head %} {% endblock %} {% block body_attrs %}class="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center p-4" style="background: #f5f5f0;"{% endblock %} {% block body %} 

curl -X POST {{ request.host_url }}api/boards \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer {{ admin_token }}" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name": "My First Board"}'

python cli.py create "Board Name"
